places.name: The Dowling House
places.description: The oldest house in Galena, Illinois, now is a reminder of when this city was the world's lead mining capital.

places.name: West Street Sculpture Park
places.description: Dozens of large steel sculptures fill this two-acre park outside a former blacksmith's studio.

places.name: DeSoto House Hotel
places.description: The oldest operating hotel in Illinois enjoys a historic (and some say haunted) past.
